&nbsp;— structural/temporal integrity failure</span></div><div style=""><span style="font-size: 13px;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; • INTEGRITY_MISMATCH — systemic inconsistency<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;
